title: NavigateAction
description: Build a URL from a template + the user's data and report it back for native to navigate to.

url.description: URL template; ${field} and ${field|transform} tokens are filled from the user profile

ageRange.description: age buckets like "18-30" used by the ageRange URL transform

injectCaptchaHandler.description: captcha type whose supporting code should be injected before navigation
